nasb.text: whereas angels who are greater in might and power do not bring a reviling judgment against them before the Lord.

esv.text: whereas angels, though greater in might and power, do not pronounce a blasphemous judgment against them before the Lord.

cnv.text: 就是天使，雖有更大的力量與權能，尚且不用毀謗的話在主面前控告他們。

ccb.text: 即使力量和权能更大的天使都不敢在主面前用毁谤的话控告有尊荣的。

csbs.text: 就算是天使们，虽然有更大的力量和权能，也不在主面前用毁谤的话控告他们。
